chunks.title: Introduction to King Josiah
chunks.reason: Biographical summary of Josiah's reign and character.

chunks.title: Order to Repair the Temple
chunks.reason: Josiah instructs Shaphan regarding the temple funds.

chunks.title: Discovery of the Book of the Law
chunks.reason: Hilkiah finds the scroll and Shaphan reads it to the king.

chunks.title: Josiah's Reaction and Commission
chunks.reason: The king tears his clothes and sends a delegation to inquire of Yahweh.

chunks.title: Prophecy of Huldah
chunks.reason: Huldah delivers Yahweh's judgment on Judah and mercy to Josiah.
